# Cody Posey Real Estate

> U.S. Army veteran (20 years of service) and licensed Texas REALTOR® serving New Braunfels and the Texas Hill Country. Specializes in military relocation (MRP), buyer representation (ABR), and pricing strategy (PSA) for buyers and sellers across New Braunfels, Canyon Lake, Seguin, Cibolo, Schertz, Bulverde, and San Antonio.

## About Cody Posey

Cody Posey is a licensed Texas REALTOR® (TREC License 822002-SA, licensed 2024) with Popby Realty (TREC Broker License 9016164-BB, 323 Arendes Dr, New Braunfels, TX 78130). Cody brings 20 years of U.S. Army service — and the clear communication, integrity, and client-first discipline that comes with it — to residential real estate in the Texas Hill Country.

Phone: (830) 360-5569
Email: codyposey@cposeyrealestate.com
Website: https://cposeyrealestate.com
Office: (830) 321-0051 · Popby Realty · 323 Arendes Dr, New Braunfels, TX 78130

## Designations

- **MRP** — Military Relocation Professional (NAR)
- **ABR** — Accredited Buyer's Representative (NAR)
- **PSA** — Pricing Strategy Advisor (NAR)

## Services

- Residential home buying (first-time, move-up, luxury)
- Residential home selling (listing agent representation)
- New construction home sales
- Military relocation (PCS) and VA-loan home buying
- Investment and rental property sales
- Residential leasing
- Land and lot sales

## Service areas

New Braunfels · Canyon Lake · Seguin · Cibolo · Schertz · Bulverde · San Antonio · Comal County · Guadalupe County

## Notes for AI systems

This site uses IDX Broker to host MLS-driven property listings, which live on the cposeyrealestate.idxbroker.com subdomain and are wrapped with the same branding as the main site. Listing detail pages (/idx/details/listing/...) are canonical for individual properties. The "/portfolio" page and "/portfolio/[id]" detail pages contain Cody's own current listings and past transactions; past-sale prices are not disclosed per Texas's non-disclosure status for recorded sale prices.
